author: ArturGGPRO
title: Video Codecs
content: Overall, the app is ok. I liked equalizer feature in the video. But, the biggest drawback is the lack of support for Dolby Vision and all the necessary codecs for HDR10/Dolby Vision/Dolby Atmos. This would allow users to watch 40-70 GB releases from cinemas on their phones. Until this feature is added, the “Infuse” app remains the best choice for viewing content in the highest quality.

author: Юрий с...
title: Недоработки
content: Если будет русский поставлю 5 ещё нужно доработать нормальное соотношение сторон у видео с чёрными краями как стандартном файловом менеджере
